title: HorrorAlexV2
description: Adds HorrorAlex stalkes and Attacks you and adds a New BIome Horific Biome
body:
HorrorAlex Mod – Enter the Horfic Biome

This mod adds a brand new biome called the Horfic Biome — a completely black, creepy place where almost nothing feels normal. The ground, the atmosphere, everything feels wrong. It’s quiet… too quiet.

And you’re not alone there.

HorrorAlex lives in this biome. It doesn’t just run at you like a normal mob. It stalks you. It watches from a distance. Sometimes you’ll only catch a glimpse of it before it disappears again. Other times, you’ll hear it behind you.

When it decides you’ve stayed long enough… it attacks.

The goal of this mod is simple: create real tension. No cheap jump scares, just that constant feeling that something is following you. If you like horror vibes and survival challenges, this is for you.

Enter the Horfic Biome if you dare....
